title: CORE northstar document header (ADR-105 D5)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter header of a northstar document under .specs/northstar/. Authored per ADR-105 D5 as the minimum-viable schema for the 'northstar' document kind. Northstar documents define the invariant goals and system-completion criteria that guide every governance decision in CORE. The prose body is unconstrained; this schema governs only the structured header block.
